category_sources: source_facts.description describes an interactive command-line HTTP client with autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives http-prompt; official docs title uses HTTP Prompt.
docs_sources: Official documentation is on docs.http-prompt.com; source_facts.homepage is the official project site; official GitHub README is linked by the project.
repo_sources: Official GitHub project is httpie/http-prompt; source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official project sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an interactive command-line HTTP client with autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
